description_long: This is a gold-toned ring featuring a large, oval-shaped yellow gemstone set in a prominent bezel at its center. The gemstone is flanked by two dark accent bands on either side, which contrast with the pale, polished metal of the band. The band itself is smooth and rounded, with a slightly thick profile that supports the weight of the central stone. The ring is displayed on a dark blue, slightly glossy cushion, which highlights the reflective qualities of both the metal and the gemstone. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, with a focus on the central stone as the main decorative element. The craftsmanship appears precise, with clean lines and a symmetrical setting.
description: A gold-toned ring with a large oval yellow gemstone, flanked by dark accent bands on a smooth, polished band.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large yellow gemstone set in the center, flanked by two dark accent bands and the full width of the band.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the band and the raised profile of the gemstone setting.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous band and the open back of the gemstone setting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the band’s thickness and the gemstone’s elevation above the band.
